rationale: Keep this pair because the citing paper’s focal constructs include psychological distance and quality–price trade-offs (operationalized via lead time and travel distance), while the cited paper specifically shows how temporal/spatial distance changes compensatory trade-off processing in choice. With an exact DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.48.1.62), this looks like a plausible mechanism/theory source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
